title: TODD Prestige Liquid Shoe Polish Black with Carnauba Wax | Instant Shine and Protect for Shoes, Boots, Bags | 75ml Bottle with Sponge
features: An easy-to-use instant shoe polish provides long-lasting shine, colour and water resistant. Our premium wax formula helps nourish and protect leather.
Recommended to use on leather shoes only.
Not suitable for use on suede, nubuck or fabric.
description: Product Description TODD Prestige is a leading shoe care brand that provides a range of products to keep your shoes looking fresh and clean. Our collection of products includes shoe polish paste, liquid polish, all-in-one sponge, waterproof protector, shoe deo, colour renovator as well as shoe care accessories such as brushes, insoles and laces. All TODD CARE products are formulated with high-quality, ingredients that are safe for all types of shoes, including leather, suede, and canvas. Products are easy to use and provide long-lasting protection against dirt, stains, and other contaminants, ensuring that your Shoes stay in top condition. TODD PRESTIGE Colour Shine Liquid Shoe Polish Black TODD PRESTIGE Colour Shine Liquid Shoe Polish An easy-to-use instant shoe polish provides long-lasting shine, colour and water resistant. Our premium wax formula helps nourish and protect leather: Recommended to use on leather shoes only. Not suitable for use on suede, nubuck or fabric.
